title: Skyblock :3
description: A hypixel skyblock modpack for quality of life features and increased performance.
body: A simple modpack that includes some quality of life mods for hypixel skyblock while also not being to overwhelming to customize. The only mod that is used for customization is skyblocker, which can be accessed through /skyblocker ingame. A lot of these mods are self explanitory like, dark ui, hidden recipe book and chat calculator. while others are a bit more confusing. But most of these mods are simply there to improve the overall performance of the game while adding in a little bit of customization.
